title: Brown Balloons, 50 Pcs Balloon Pack 10 Inch Brown Balloon, Matte Latex Balloons for Khaki Theme Graduation Birthday Party Proposal Wedding Baby Shower Anniversary Decoration
features: Brown Party Decorations: Don't you want to make an impressive memory for your birthday party? Add these vibrant and unique balloons to your party for the perfect decoration. These balloons will make an impressive and memorable party for your kids, yourself, your family and friends

Perfect Party Supplies: 50Pcs 10 inch brown balloons with dazzling colors will make your party very attractive, a great way to decorate a birthday or other party events. Can be used anywhere anytime by all ages

Premium Durable: The balloon is made of latex, which is thick and durable. They're handpicked by us to make each balloon look as bright and cheerful as the pictures. They don't look beautiful for a little while, rather last for ages, just like the happiness at that party that never fades away

What To Fill With: These balloons can be filled with air and helium. These party balloons filled with air will stay full for up to 72 hours, while with helium will stay full for 3-6 hours. Add these vibrant colours to your party like Mother's Day, Bridal Showers, New Year’s day, Leaving Party, Hen Party,Retirement, etc

Warm Tips: Please DO NOT overfill it and recommend inflate the balloon less than 90%. When it’s in round shape, it is in the best size and condition. Please avoid sunburn, overheat, pointed object and excessive friction. Please kindly note that any holes or popped balloons within 1-2 pcs for every 50 balloons is a normal phenomenon
